(B) For every point $$(\alpha, \beta) \neq(7,7)$$ on the line $$x-2 y+7=0$$, the system has infinitely many solutions
(C) There is a unique point $$(\alpha, \beta)$$ on the line $$x+2 y+18=0$$ for which the system has infinitely many solutions
(D) If $$\alpha=\beta$$ and $$\alpha \neq 7$$, then the system has a unique solution
